title: Engineering the future of Kubernetes for AI at scale
summary: Google Cloud Tech presented at Google Cloud Next on evolving Kubernetes infrastructure for AI-scale workloads including agents, inference, and batch processing. The session discussed hardware-aware platforms, resource optimization, and securing agentic workflows as enterprises shift primary workloads to AI.
writeup: The session, presented by Google Cloud Tech at Google Cloud Next, covers how Kubernetes infrastructure is evolving to support AI-scale workloads such as agents, inference, and batch processing. It addresses hardware-aware platforms, resource optimization, and the security of agentic workflows as enterprises move primary workloads to AI. The discussion frames concrete priorities: throughput optimization, hardware reuse, and securing agent-driven processes.
